# MapLibre GL JS

This directory contains the MapLibre GL JS 5.24.0 browser distribution used by
`../../index.html`. It is bundled locally so the Mappable page only needs the
network for its OpenFreeMap basemap style and tiles.

MapLibre GL JS is licensed under the BSD 3-Clause License; see `LICENSE.txt`.
The page uses the OpenFreeMap Liberty style and retains the map's visible
OpenMapTiles and OpenStreetMap attribution.
